vocab.example: I recently purchased a large floor mirror to enhance the interior decor of my minimalist living room.

vocab.meaning: khung gương chạm trổ/có tính trang trí
vocab.example: I was captivated by a vintage mirror with an ornate, ornamental frame at a local flea market.
We bought a sunburst-style mirror to serve as the focal point of the dining area.

vocab.meaning: ảo giác về không gian (làm không gian rộng hơn)
vocab.example: I specifically looked for a wide wall mirror to create an illusion of space in my cramped studio apartment.
The mirror I chose has a beveled edge, which gives it a more sophisticated and polished look.
Safety was my priority, so I opted for a mirror made of shatterproof glass for the children's bedroom.
I managed to source a Victorian-era mirror from a reputable antique dealer in the city center.
I invested in a high-quality vanity mirror with adjustable LED lighting for my morning routine.
The mirror’s gilded finish adds a touch of opulence and luxury to the master suite.

vocab.meaning: tôn vinh/phù hợp với thẩm mỹ của căn phòng
vocab.example: It took me months to find a piece that would perfectly complement the aesthetic of my contemporary home.
